purpose: Record combat feat pass for Returning Bug, Zero Range, Follow Through, Relentless Attack, Deft Charge, Prime Shot, Rebel Military Training, and Destructive Force.

alreadyImplementedEntries.name: Returning Bug
alreadyImplementedEntries.mechanic: Existing weapon-leftover normalizer stores returningBugReturnToHandOnMiss as a MISS_RIDER for Razor Bug and Thud Bug.

alreadyImplementedEntries.name: Relentless Attack
alreadyImplementedEntries.mechanic: Existing remaining weapon/armor normalizer requires an immediate double_attack_weapon selection and existing runtime applies +2 competence against the missed target when the target-scoped follow-up state is supplied.

implementedEntries.name: Zero Range
implementedEntries.mechanic: Ranged attack against target within/adjacent to fighting space gains +1 attack and +1 weapon die damage. Runtime excludes Heavy/Vehicle weapons and Vehicle Combat; damage die is suppressed if Burst Fire or Rapid Shot is active.

implementedEntries.name: Prime Shot
implementedEntries.mechanic: At Short Range or closer, if no ally is closer to the target, runtime exposes +1 circumstance attack bonus.

implementedEntries.name: Deft Charge
implementedEntries.mechanic: After Charge attack resolution, helper exposes removal of turn-ending behavior and allowance for Swift, Reaction, and Free Actions before turn end.

implementedEntries.name: Rebel Military Training
implementedEntries.mechanic: When Running Attack moved before and after the attack, helper exposes +2 dodge Reflex until start of next turn.

implementedEntries.name: Follow Through
implementedEntries.mechanic: After a melee attack reduces a target to 0 HP, helper exposes immediate movement up to Speed once/turn; with Cleave, metadata allows movement before the Cleave extra attack.

implementedEntries.name: Destructive Force
implementedEntries.mechanic: When object/Vehicle damage equals/exceeds DT and reduces it to 0 HP, helper exposes advisory 1 die same-type damage to all adjacent targets, including allies.

automationBoundary.Zero Range: Attack workflow must pass adjacent/within-fighting-space context. Runtime handles non-stacking with Burst Fire/Rapid Shot by suppressing Zero Range extra die.
automationBoundary.Prime Shot: Workflow must pass noAllyCloserToTarget and range band context.
automationBoundary.Deft Charge: Charge workflow must consume getActionEconomyRiders after charge attack resolution.
automationBoundary.Rebel Military Training: Running Attack workflow must pass moved-before-and-after context and apply/expire the defense effect.
automationBoundary.Follow Through: Damage workflow must call getDropTargetRiders when melee damage reduces a target to 0 HP; Cleave workflow must consume cleaveInteraction metadata.
automationBoundary.Destructive Force: Damage workflow must pass object/vehicle, DT, and destroyed-context flags and apply adjacent damage manually/workflow-side.
